The Canaanite, king of Arad, who dwelt in the Negeb Rather, "the Canaanite, king of Arad, who ruled in the Negeb." Hebrew yoshev can be rendered "ruler,"' in which case, Numbers 21 would imply that the king of Arad ruled over the entire Negeb. The version of Numbers 33 states that he was a ruler ba-negev, "in the Negeb"; that is, there were other rulers there, a usage attested in Zechariah 9:6.…

The Canaanite, king of Arad, who dwelt in the Negeb Rather, "the Canaanite, king of Arad, who ruled in the Negeb." Hebrew yoshev can be rendered "ruler,"' in which case, Numbers 21 would imply that the king of Arad ruled over the entire Negeb. The version of Numbers 33 states that he was a ruler ba-negev, "in the Negeb"; that is, there were other rulers there, a usage attested in Zechariah 9:6.…
